commit.message:
Fix history API HTTP 400: embed query string in URL, avoid params= re-encoding

Build full URL string before yarl.URL(encoded=True) so aiohttp never
re-encodes colons in the ISO timestamp path segment. Remove separate
params= arg from session.get() which was the root cause. Also raises
history timeout to 60s and logs response body on error. Bump to v1.0.12.

commit.message:
Add anti-edge-camping patterns to prevent wall-hugging strategy

Two new obstacle patterns:
- Edge Sweep: lines both edges with cubes every row, making wall
  hugging lethal. Available from level 1+ so camping never works.
- Forced Crossing: blocks one entire side for 5 rows, then switches
  to blocking the other side, forcing the player to cross through
  the center. Available from level 2+.

Both patterns added to index.html and game-env.js so the RL agent
also has to deal with them during training.

commit.message:
kind-pasteur-2026-03-06-S25h: PROVE t3 parity determines skeleton bipartition

THM-059: For GS tilings, t3(T) + t3(flip(T)) = n-2 + even, which is
ODD at odd n. Therefore t3 parity always flips, making the skeleton
bipartite with odd-t3 / even-t3 sides. Verified at n=3,5,7,9.

Key mechanism: consecutive triples contribute exactly 1 each (total n-2),
non-consecutive triples contribute even total (Types A and B).

Diff distribution follows scaled Binomial(n-2, 1/2) exactly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message: fix(guides): fix background images not rendering on category card sections Replace Next.js with a plain for the decorative category background. fill images require an explicit parent height which this dynamic card grid container doesn't provide, causing the image to not render. A regular img with absolute inset-0 w-full h-full fills correctly regardless of container height. Also bump opacity 0.05→0.09 and overlay white/0.92→white/0.88 so the atmospheric tint is faintly visible rather than invisible. Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

fix: use beforeSelectionRemoved for selection wrapping

The selection is deleted BEFORE beforeCharTyped fires, which is why all
previous approaches (TypedHandlerDelegate.beforeCharTyped, Swing
InputMap/ActionMap) silently failed — hasSelection() was always false.

beforeSelectionRemoved fires while the selection still exists. Returning
STOP prevents deletion and default typing. Follows the same proven
pattern as AsciiDoc plugin's FormattingQuotedTypedHandler.

Supports: *, ~, _, `, |, -

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix E2E DB safety and draw test cascade failures

- Rename Vinterserien E2E seed DB to itest_vinterserien to prevent
  collision with real databases on the same MySQL server
- Move draw reseed to afterAll hook so cleanup runs even on test failure
- Reseed by dropping only MeOS tables (not oxygen_* tables) to keep
  Prisma connections alive and avoid breaking subsequent tests
- Fix Vinterserien event test selector for strict mode (multiple matches)

All 99 E2E tests now pass reliably.

commit.message:
feat: phases 1-5 — parsing, filters, MCP/CLI, UI, attachment indexing

Phase 1 – Parsing enhancements:
  BCC extraction, attachment metadata (MIME/size), email_type via
  in_reply_to, HTML-to-text rewrite (headings/lists/tables/links/
  blockquote/pre), signature detection & stripping, quoted-content
  stripping, threading (conversation_id/in_reply_to), deduplication.

Phase 2 – Search & filter improvements:
  To, BCC, has_attachments, priority filters in search_filtered();
  attachment names embedded in chunk-0 search text; BCC and
  attachment_count in chunk metadata.

Phase 3 – MCP & CLI exposure:
  New email_search_by_recipient tool; to/bcc/has_attachments/priority
  fields in structured search; --to and --has-attachments CLI flags.

Phase 4 – UI improvements:
  To filter, has_attachments checkbox, folder sidebar with counts,
  richer results (email-type/attachment badges, To display, thread
  view button), CSV export alongside JSON.

Phase 5 – Attachment content indexing:
  attachment_extractor.py (txt/csv/html/pdf/docx/xlsx), chunk_attachment()
  in chunker.py, --extract-attachments ingest flag, binary extraction
  from OLM via base64 inline or ZIP path strategies.

213 tests pass, ruff clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Review: Zstd.lean spec quality audit — deduplicate proofs and document grind (#787)

* refactor: deduplicate parseFrameHeader proofs and document grind usage

Deduplicate parseFrameHeader_pos_gt by deriving it from
parseFrameHeader_pos_ge_five (pos' ≥ pos + 5 → pos' > pos via omega),
eliminating ~25 lines of duplicated guard-peeling proof.

Document why grind is needed in decompressFrame_contentSize_eq and
decompressFrame_checksum_valid: split can't decompose match on
structure fields (header.contentSize, header.dictionaryId).

Closes #767

* Add npm start script and SessionStart hook for Claude Code on the web

- Add "start" script to package.json using npx serve on port 3000
- Create .claude/hooks/session-start.sh to run npm install on remote sessions
- Register hook in .claude/settings.json

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QspnTPJSfVfc7642pNuNAf

* Simplify: fix reuse, quality, and efficiency issues (#3)

- weather.js: add CityNotFoundError class (replaces fragile string-prefix
  matching), export wmoDescription helper (removes WMO_CODES leak into UI
  layer), return latitude/longitude from fetchWeatherData (enables coord
  caching), drop unused country field
- script.js: cache last geocoded coords so units-toggle re-renders skip a
  redundant geocode network round-trip; use getUserLocation from
  geolocation.js instead of raw navigator.geolocation call; switch
  innerHTML='' clears to replaceChildren(); batch forecast cards into a
  DocumentFragment before appending; use instanceof CityNotFoundError
- ui.js: delegate displayTemperature conversion to celsiusToFahrenheit
  from utils.js; delegate formatTimestamp formatting to formatTime from
  utils.js

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EQ2PN65L8GbCeDC4H1cbRD

fix: restore claude opus model per project spec

The spec explicitly requires claude-opus-4-5 for all API calls.
Sonnet was a temporary debugging workaround — reverting to the
intended model for intent detection and slack summarization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 消除技能/附魔描述歧义 + 成长/精通兼容multiply型

描述修正（31条）:
- 溅射: 激活→触发, 加"不再引发溅射"
- 共鸣: 激活→触发, 加"不再引发共鸣"
- 成长/精通: "自身永久"→"自身产出永久"
- 排斥: 加"触发时："前缀 + "产出+N%"
- 吞噬: "最弱"→"图标最少", "+20%/图标"→"产出+20%/自身图标数"
- 变性: "N%效率"→"本次产出的N%"
- 增幅者: 加"每个"明确全体生效（数据+动态函数+测试）

实现修正:
- 产出者multiply分支: delta计算加入enchMult缩放
- 转化者multiply分支: delta计算加入enchMult缩放
- 成长/精通附魔现对add和multiply型技能行为一致
